messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create a Python script using python-pptx to build an 18-slide vibrant modern presentation for internal e-commerce teams reviewing Q4 conversion metrics. The output file must be named "ecommerce_q4.pptx" and all content should be in Korean. Use the standard 16:9 Widescreen slide size. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs or web scraping to fetch data; use hardcoded sample data only. When adding charts, you must explicitly use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Additionally, implement defensive programming by ensuring that any attempt to set text on a title shape first checks if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "ecommerce_q4.pptx"

PRIMARY = RGBColor(0x25, 0x63, 0xEB)
SECONDARY = RGBColor(0x0E, 0xA5, 0xE9)
ACCENT = RGBColor(0xF5, 0x9E, 0xB)
SUCCESS = RGBColor(0x10, 0xB9, 0x81)
DANGER = RGBColor(0xEF, 0x44, 0x44)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
BLACK = RGBColor(0x11, 0x18, 0x27)
GRAY_50 = RGBColor(0xF9, 0xFA, 0xFB)
GRAY_100 = RGBColor(0xF3, 0xF4, 0xF6)
GRAY_200 = RGBColor(0xE5, 0xE7, 0xEB)
GRAY_400 = RGBColor(0x9C, 0xA0, 0xA8)
GRAY_600 = RGBColor(0x4B, 0x55, 0x63)
GRAY_800 = RGBColor(0x1F, 0x29, 0x37)

MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.75)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.75)
CARD_WIDTH = Inches(2.8)
CARD_HEIGHT = Inches(1.6)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.3)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=GRAY_800, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = "Aptos"
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, value, subtitle="", accent_color=PRIMARY):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = WHITE
    shape.line.color.rgb = GRAY_200
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3), title, font_size=11, bold=True, color=GRAY_600)
    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.5), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.5), value, font_size=28, bold=True, color=BLACK)

    if subtitle:
        sub_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(1.15), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.04))
        sub_shape.fill.solid()
        sub_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = accent_color

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, y_position):
    label = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, y_position, Inches(12), Inches(0.5))
    tf = label.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(18)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    run.font.name = "Aptos"


def add_footer(slide, page_number, total_pages):
    num_text = f"{page_number} / {total_pages}"
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(12.0), Inches(7.05), Inches(1.0), Inches(0.3), num_text, font_size=9, color=GRAY_400, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = GRAY_100
        shape.line.color.rgb = GRAY_200
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(height.inches / 2 - 0.25), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5), "이미지", font_size=14, color=GRAY_400, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_line(slide, left, top, width, color=GRAY_200):
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Inches(0.03))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_bulleted_list(slide, left, top, width, height, items, font_size=14):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for i, item in enumerate(items):
        if i == 0:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p = tf.add_paragraph()
        p.space_after = Pt(8)
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = f"• {item}"
        run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        run.font.color.rgb = GRAY_800
        run.font.name = "Aptos"


def add_numbered_list(slide, left, top, width, height, items, font_size=14):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for i, item in enumerate(items):
        if i == 0:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p = tf.add_paragraph()
        p.space_after = Pt(10)
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = f"{i + 1}. {item}"
        run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        run.font.color.rgb = GRAY_800
        run.font.name = "Aptos"


def add_title_text(slide, text):
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = text
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), text, font_size=32, bold=True, color=BLACK)


def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(10), Inches(1.2), "Q4 전환 지표 리뷰", font_size=44, bold=True, color=BLACK)
    add_line(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.1), Inches(3), PRIMARY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.6), "2024년 4분기 이커머스 핵심 성과 분석", font_size=20, color=GRAY_600)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "이커머스 팀 | 2024년 12월", font_size=14, color=GRAY_400)

    # Decorative accent
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(11.5), Inches(0), Inches(1.833), Inches(7.5))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY


def slide_02_agenda(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")
    add_title_text(slide, "목차")

    agenda_items = [
        ("01", "핵심 지표 개요"),
        ("02", "월별 매출 추이 분석"),
        ("03", "트래픽 소스 및 채널 성과"),
        ("04", "카테고리별 전환 분석"),
        ("05", "구매 여정 파이프라인"),
        ("06", "모바일 vs 데스크톱 비교"),
        ("07", "장바구니 이탈률 분석"),
        ("08", "A/B 테스트 결과 및 인사이트"),
    ]

    y = Inches(1.3)
    for num, title in agenda_items:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2), y, Inches(1), Inches(0.5), num, font_size=24, bold=True, color=PRIMARY)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(3.2), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), title, font_size=16, color=GRAY_800)
        add_line(slide, Inches(2), y + Inches(0.55), Inches(9), GRAY_200)
        y += Inches(0.7)

    add_footer(slide, 2, 18)


def slide_03_key_metrics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")
    add_title_text(slide, "핵심 지표 개요")

    metrics = [
        ("총 매출 (GMV)", "₩487억", "+12.3% YoY", PRIMARY),
        ("전환율 (CVR)", "3.8%", "+0.5%p 개선", SUCCESS),
        ("평균 주문 금액 (AOV)", "₩98,500", "+8.1% 증가", SECONDARY),
        ("고객 획득 비용 (CAC)", "₩24,300", "-6.7% 절감", ACCENT),
    ]

    x = Inches(1.2)
    for title, value, subtitle, color in metrics:
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.5), CARD_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT, title, value, subtitle, color)
        x += CARD_WIDTH + CARD_GAP

    add_footer(slide, 3, 18)


def slide_04_monthly_revenue(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")
    add_title_text(slide, "월별 매출 추이 (단위: 억 원)")

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["10월", "11월", "12월"]
    chart_data.add_series("매출", (145, 168, 174))
    chart_data.add_series("전년 동기", (130, 149, 155))

    left = Inches(1.5)
    top = Inches(1.5)
    width = Inches(10.5)
    height = Inches(4.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, left, top, width, height, chart_data)

    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = plot.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(10)
    data_labels.number_format = "#,##0"

    series_0 = plot.series[0]
    series_0.format.line.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    series_0.format.line.width = Pt(3)
    series_1 = plot.series[1]
    series_1.format.line.color.rgb = GRAY_400
    series_1.format.line.width = Pt(2)

    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    chart.legend.font.size = Pt(11)

    add_footer(slide, 4, 18)


def slide_05_traffic_sources(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")
    add_title_text(slide, "트래픽 소스 분포")

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["직접 방문", "검색 (유료)", "검색 (자연)", "소셜 미디어", "리퍼럴", "이메일"]
    chart_data.add_series("비중 (%)", [32, 25, 18, 12, 8, 5])

    left = Inches(1.5)
    top = Inches(1.5)
    width = Inches(6)
    height = Inches(4.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, left, top, width, height, chart_data)

    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = plot.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(12)
    data_labels.show_percentage = True
    data_labels.show_category_name = False

    colors = [PRIMARY, SECONDARY, ACCENT, SUCCESS, DANGER, GRAY_400]
    for i, color in enumerate(colors):
        plot.series[0].points[i].format.fill.solid()
        plot.series[0].points[i].format.fill.fore_color.rgb = color

    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    chart.legend.font.size = Pt(11)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(8), Inches(2.5), Inches(4), Inches(3), "주요 인사이트\n• 직접 방문 비중이 가장 높음\n• 유료 검색에 대한 투자 확대 필요\n• 이메일 마케팅 전환율 개선 기회", font_size=13, color=GRAY_600)

    add_footer(slide, 5, 18)


def slide_06_category_performance(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")
    add_title_text(slide, "카테고리별 전환율 (상위 7개)")

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["패션", "전자제품", "뷰티", "식품", "가전", "도서", "스포츠"]
    chart_data.add_series("전환율 (%)", [4.2, 3.8, 5.1, 2.9, 3.5, 2.1, 3.0])

    left = Inches(1.5)
    top = Inches(1.5)
    width = Inches(10.5)
    height = Inches(4.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)

    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series_0 = plot.series[0]
    for point in series_0.points:
        point.format.fill.solid()
        point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY

    chart.has_legend = False
    chart.value_axis.has_title = True
    chart.value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "전환율 (%)"
    chart.category_axis.has_title = True
    chart.category_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "카테고리"

    add_footer(slide, 6, 18)


def slide_07_funnel_analysis(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")
    add_title_text(slide, "구매 여정 파이프라인 분석")

    funnel_data = [
        ("페이지 뷰", "125만", "100%", PRIMARY),
        ("장바구니 추가", "47.5만", "38%", SECONDARY),
        ("결제 시작", "25만", "20%", ACCENT),
        ("구매 완료", "4.75만", "3.8%", SUCCESS),
    ]

    x = Inches(1.5)
    y = Inches(1.8)
    for title, count, rate, color in funnel_data:
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(2.6), Inches(1.4), title, count, rate, color)
        x += Inches(3.0)

    # Arrow connectors between cards
    for i in range(3):
        arrow_x = Inches(1.5 + 2.6 + (i * 3.0))
        add_text_box(slide, arrow_x, Inches(2.3), Inches(0.4), Inches(0.4), "→", font_size=28, bold=True, color=GRAY_400)

    # Insight box at bottom
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(10.5), Inches(2.5))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = GRAY_50
    shape.line.color.rgb = GRAY_200

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.8), Inches(3.75), Inches(10), Inches(0.4), "주요 인사이트", font_size=16, bold=True, color=BLACK)
    add_bulleted_list(slide, Inches(1.8), Inches(4.2), Inches(10), Inches(1.8), [
        "장바구니 → 결제 전환율 53%로 개선 필요",
        "결제 단계 이탈이 가장 큰 병목 지점",
        "모바일 장바구니 추가율은 데스크톱 대비 22% 낮음"
    ], font_size=14)

    add_footer(slide, 7, 18)


def slide_08_mobile_vs_desktop(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")
    add_title_text(slide, "모바일 vs 데스크톱 비교 분석")

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["페이지 뷰", "장바구니 추가율", "결제 전환율", "AOV (만원)"]
    chart_data.add_series("모바일", [62, 31, 2.8, 9.5])
    chart_data.add_series("데스크톱", [38, 47, 5.2, 10.8])

    left = Inches(1.5)
    top = Inches(1.5)
    width = Inches(10.5)
    height = Inches(4.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)

    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series_0 = plot.series[0]
    for point in series_0.points:
        point.format.fill.solid()
        point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = SECONDARY
    series_1 = plot.series[1]
    for point in series_1.points:
        point.format.fill.solid()
        point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY

    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    chart.legend.font.size = Pt(12)

    add_footer(slide, 8, 18)


def slide_09_customer_segmentation(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")
    add_title_text(slide, "고객 세그먼트 분석")

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["신규 고객", "재구매 고객", "VIP 고객"]
    chart_data.add_series("비중 (%)", [45, 38, 17])

    left = Inches(1.5)
    top = Inches(1.5)
    width = Inches(6)
    height = Inches(4.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, left, top, width, height, chart_data)

    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = plot.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(12)
    data_labels.show_percentage = True
    data_labels.show_category_name = False

    colors = [SECONDARY, PRIMARY, ACCENT]
    for i, color in enumerate(colors):
        plot.series[0].points[i].format.fill.solid()
        plot.series[0].points[i].format.fill.fore_color.rgb = color

    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False

    # Insight panel on right
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(8), Inches(1.5), Inches(4), Inches(0.5), "세그먼트별 특징", font_size=16, bold=True, color=BLACK)
    add_bulleted_list(slide, Inches(8), Inches(2.2), Inches(4), Inches(3.5), [
        "신규 고객: 첫 구매 후 30일 내 재방문율 28%",
        "재구매 고객: 연평균 4.2회 구매, AOV +15%",
        "VIP 고객 (상위 5%): 매출의 35% 기여"
    ], font_size=13)

    add_footer(slide, 9, 18)


def slide_10_cart_abandonment(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")
    add_title_text(slide, "장바구니 이탈률 분석 (세그먼트별)")

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["모바일 신규", "모바일 재구매", "데스크톱 신규", "데스크톱 재구매", "VIP"]
    chart_data.add_series("이탈률 (%)", [72, 58, 61, 49, 35])

    left = Inches(1.5)
    top = Inches(1.5)
    width = Inches(10.5)
    height = Inches(4.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)

    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series_0 = plot.series[0]
    for point in series_0.points:
        point.format.fill.solid()
        if "모바일 신규" in str(chart_data.categories):
            pass  # handled below
        point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = DANGER

    chart.has_legend = False
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(6.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "모바일 신규 고객 이탈률이 가장 높음 — 모바일 결제 UX 개선 시급", font_size=13, bold=True, color=DANGER)

    add_footer(slide, 10, 18)


def slide_11_checkout_metrics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")
    add_title_text(slide, "결제 최적화 핵심 지표")

    metrics = [
        ("평균 결제 시간", "2분 34초", "-18% 개선", SUCCESS),
        ("결제 성공률", "96.2%", "+2.1%p 향상", PRIMARY),
        ("환불율", "1.8%", "-0.5%p 감소", ACCENT),
    ]

    x = Inches(1.2)
    for title, value, subtitle, color in metrics:
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.6), CARD_HEIGHT + Inches(0.4), title, value, subtitle, color)
        x += Inches(3.9)

    # Additional insight cards below
    insights = [
        ("원클릭 결제 도입", "전환율 +24%"),
        ("게스트 체크아웃", "이탈률 -15%"),
        ("자동 할인 적용", "AOV +7%"),
    ]

    x = Inches(1.2)
    for title, value in insights:
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(3.8), Inches(3.6), Inches(1.4), title, value, "", SECONDARY)
        x += Inches(3.9)

    add_footer(slide, 11, 18)


def slide_12_ab_test_results(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")
    add_title_text(slide, "A/B 테스트 주요 결과")

    tests = [
        ("CTA 버튼 색상", "초록 vs 빨강", "+18% 전환율"),
        ("상품 페이지 레이아웃", "단일 vs 그리드", "+12% 클릭률"),
        ("무료 배송 문구", "표시 vs 숨김", "+9% 구매 전환"),
        ("리뷰 표시 위치", "상단 vs 하단", "+6% 신뢰도"),
    ]

    y = Inches(1.5)
    for test, variant, result in tests:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), y, Inches(3), Inches(0.4), test, font_size=14, bold=True, color=BLACK)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(4.8), y, Inches(3), Inches(0.4), variant, font_size=12, color=GRAY_600)

        result_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(8.5), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(3.5), Inches(0.4))
        result_shape.fill.solid()
        result_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = SUCCESS
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.7), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(3.1), Inches(0.4), result, font_size=12, bold=True, color=WHITE)

        add_line(slide, Inches(1.5), y + Inches(0.5), Inches(10.5), GRAY_200)
        y += Inches(0.65)

    add_footer(slide, 12, 18)


def slide_13_campaign_impact(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")
    add_title_text(slide, "시즌별 캠페인 효과 분석")

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["블랙프라이데이", "크리스마스", "연말정산", "새해맞이"]
    chart_data.add_series("일반 매출", (120, 135, 148, 130))
    chart_data.add_series("캠페인 매출", (165, 178, 195, 172))

    left = Inches(1.5)
    top = Inches(1.5)
    width = Inches(10.5)
    height = Inches(4.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)

    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series_0 = plot.series[0]
    for point in series_0.points:
        point.format.fill.solid()
        point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = GRAY_400
    series_1 = plot.series[1]
    for point in series_1.points:
        point.format.fill.solid()
        point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY

    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    chart.legend.font.size = Pt(12)

    add_footer(slide, 13, 18)


def slide_14_top_products(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")
    add_title_text(slide, "Q4 베스트셀러 TOP 5")

    products = [
        ("무선 이어폰 Pro", "₩89,000", "12,450개"),
        ("스마트워치 Lite", "₩129,000", "8,320개"),
        ("유기농 스킨케어 세트", "₩67,000", "7,890개"),
        ("블루투스 키보드", "₩54,000", "6,150개"),
        ("에어프라이어 3.5L", "₩149,000", "5,230개"),
    ]

    y = Inches(1.5)
    for rank, (name, price, units) in enumerate(products):
        badge_color = [PRIMARY, SECONDARY, ACCENT, SUCCESS, GRAY_600][rank]

        # Rank badge
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(1.5), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(0.5), Inches(0.5))
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = badge_color
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.52), y + Inches(0.08), Inches(0.46), Inches(0.45), str(rank + 1), font_size=16, bold=True, color=WHITE)

        # Product name and price
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.3), y, Inches(4), Inches(0.4), name, font_size=15, bold=True, color=BLACK)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.3), y + Inches(0.35), Inches(3), Inches(0.3), price, font_size=12, color=GRAY_600)

        # Units sold bar
        bar_width = Inches(4) - (rank * Inches(0.3))
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.5), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(2), Inches(0.4), units, font_size=13, bold=True, color=PRIMARY)

        # Progress bar background
        bg_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(9.8), y + Inches(0.15), Inches(2), Inches(0.3))
        bg_bar.fill.solid()
        bg_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = GRAY_100

        # Progress bar fill
        fill_width = Inches(2) - (rank * Inches(0.15))
        fill_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(9.8), y + Inches(0.15), fill_width, Inches(0.3))
        fill_bar.fill.solid()
        fill_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = badge_color

        add_line(slide, Inches(1.5), y + Inches(0.7), Inches(10.5), GRAY_200)
        y += Inches(0.8)

    add_footer(slide, 14, 18)


def slide_15_regional_performance(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    regions = [

        ("부산", "₩72억", "+9.8%", SECONDARY),
        ("인천", "₩58억", "+11.3%", ACCENT),
        ("대구", "₩45억", "+7.6%", SUCCESS),
    ]

    x = Inches(1.2)
    for name, revenue, growth, color in regions:
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.8), Inches(2.8), Inches(2.0), name, revenue, growth, color)
        x += CARD_WIDTH + CARD_GAP

    # Additional insight box
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.3), Inches(10.5), Inches(2.2))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = GRAY_50
    shape.line.color.rgb = GRAY_200

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.8), Inches(4.45), Inches(10), Inches(0.4), "지역별 전략 제안", font_size=16, bold=True, color=BLACK)
    add_bulleted_list(slide, Inches(1.8), Inches(4.9), Inches(10), Inches(1.5), [
        "서울: 프리미엄 제품 라인업 확대 및 VIP 고객 관리 강화",
        "부산/대구: 로컬 마케팅 캠페인 및 오프라인 연계 프로모션",
        "인천: 물류 허브 특화 할인 이벤트 및 빠른 배송 서비스 홍보"
    ], font_size=13)

    add_footer(slide, 15, 18)

    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])

    add_title_text(slide, "주요 인사이트 및 발견 사항")

    insights = [
        ("전환율 개선", "모바일 장바구니 이탈률 72%로 가장 큰 개선 기회 존재"),
        ("고객 세그먼트", "VIP 고객은 매출의 35%를 기여 — 유지 전략이 핵심"),

        ("채널 최적화", "검색 유입 대비 전환율 낮음 — SEO 및 PPC 개선 시급"),

        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.8), y + Inches(0.35), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), desc, font_size=13, color=GRAY_600)

        add_line(slide, Inches(1.5), y + Inches(0.85), Inches(10.5), GRAY_200)
        y += Inches(1.0)

    add_footer(slide, 16, 18)


def slide_17_action_items(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")
    add_title_text(slide, "액션 아이템 및 다음 단계")

    actions = [
        ("모바일 결제 UX 개선", "Q1 2025", "UX 팀"),
        ("VIP 고객 전용 프로그램 론칭", "Q1 2025", "마케팅팀"),
        ("카테고리 다각화 전략 수립", "Q1 2025", "기획팀"),
        ("검색 최적화 (SEO) 강화", "지속적", "콘텐츠팀"),
        ("A/B 테스트 확대 및 자동화", "Q1-Q2 2025", "데이터팀"),
    ]

    y = Inches(1.3)
    for i, (action, timeline, owner) in enumerate(actions):
        # Number circle
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(1.5), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(0.5), Inches(0.5))
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.52), y + Inches(0.08), Inches(0.46), Inches(0.45), str(i + 1), font_size=14, bold=True, color=WHITE)

        # Action text
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.3), y, Inches(5), Inches(0.4), action, font_size=16, bold=True, color=BLACK)

        # Timeline badge
        timeline_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(8), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.4))
        timeline_shape.fill.solid()
        timeline_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = GRAY_100
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.1), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(2.3), Inches(0.4), timeline, font_size=11, color=GRAY_600)

        # Owner badge
        owner_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(10.8), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(2), Inches(0.4))
        owner_shape.fill.solid()
        owner_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = SECONDARY
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(10.9), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(1.8), Inches(0.4), owner, font_size=11, color=WHITE)

        add_line(slide, Inches(1.5), y + Inches(0.6), Inches(10.5), GRAY_200)
        y += Inches(0.75)

    add_footer(slide, 17, 18)

    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    # Large decorative shape
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(2.5), Inches(13.333), Inches(2.5))
    shape.fill.solid()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(10), Inches(0.8), "감사합니다", font_size=48, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.7), Inches(8), Inches(0.6), "Q&A 및 논의의 시간", font_size=20, color=RGBColor(0xCC, 0xDD, 0xFF))

    # Contact info
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(5.5), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "이커머스 팀 | contact@ecommerce.co.kr", font_size=13, color=GRAY_600)

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_agenda(prs)
    slide_03_key_metrics(prs)
    slide_04_monthly_revenue(prs)
    slide_05_traffic_sources(prs)
    slide_06_category_performance(prs)
    slide_07_funnel_analysis(prs)
    slide_08_mobile_vs_desktop(prs)
    slide_09_customer_segmentation(prs)
    slide_10_cart_abandonment(prs)
    slide_11_checkout_metrics(prs)
    slide_12_ab_test_results(prs)
    slide_13_campaign_impact(prs)
    slide_14_top_products(prs)
    slide_15_regional_performance(prs)
    slide_16_insights(prs)
    slide_17_action_items(prs)
    slide_18_thank_you(prs)

    prs.save(OUTPUT_FILE)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
